per_outcome.operationalization: Total coins produced by all agents over the full episode (1000 or 3000 timesteps), summed across all agents
1 minus Gini index computed from agent incomes at episode end; measures distributional equity, not output speed or quality
Multiplicative composite of income_equality and productivity; combines distributional equity with throughput into single metric
Social welfare function using inverse post-tax endowments as weights, computed at episode end; normative welfare measure, not output performance
